description_long: This object is a tactical shotgun with a matte black and dark green finish, featuring a robust metal barrel and a polymer fore-end. The shotgun is equipped with a collapsible or adjustable stock that has a skeletal design, providing both stability and reduced weight. The fore-end has a ribbed texture for improved grip, and the barrel is vented with a heat shield for better cooling during rapid fire. Three red shotgun shells are positioned next to the weapon, indicating its ammunition type. The trigger area includes a prominent pistol grip and a rounded trigger guard, enhancing control and safety during use.
description: A tactical pump-action shotgun with a collapsible stock, ribbed fore-end, and three red shells, finished in matte black and dark green.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, vented barrel, and ribbed fore-end, with shells visible to the side.
description_view_1: Side profile displaying the full length of the shotgun, collapsible stock, pistol grip, and three red shells beneath the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's skeletal structure and the alignment of the barrel and fore-end.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the ejection port area, trigger guard, and the arrangement of the shells.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing and a heat shield
attribute_stock_type: collapsible stock with skeletal design and pistol grip
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
